instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify that the actual gear matches the commanded gear.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect mismatch when Actual_Gear_Position differs from Commanded_Gear.

L4_requirements: IF Actual_Gear_Position != Commanded_Gear THEN Gear_Position_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall retry gear engagement when mismatch occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall attempt gear engagement retry when Gear_Position_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting when repeated gear mismatches occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shifting when Gear_Position_Fault_Count exceeds Fault_Limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall validate gear position sensor signals.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Gear_Position_Sensor_Status equals Invalid.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Status = Invalid THEN Gear_Position_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect unexpected gear disengagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Gear_Position equals Neutral during drive command.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position = Neutral AND Commanded_Gear = Drive THEN Gear_Position_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify gear engagement timing.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Gear_Engagement_Time exceeds Time_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Engagement_Time > Time_Limit THEN Gear_Position_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall validate gear engagement using ratio verification.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect mismatch when Gear_Ratio does not correspond to commanded gear.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Ratio != Expected_Gear_Ratio THEN Gear_Position_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate faulty gear sensors.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify faulty sensor when Gear_Position_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear during gear validation faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when Gear_Position_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear gear validation faults when condition recovers.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear gear position fault when Actual_Gear_Position equals Commanded_Gear.
